title: P14.M1.E2.T002 Resolver Conflict Coverage
summary: Add resolver conflict and precedence coverage for the scoped access resolver.

phases.name: implement
phases.title: Implement
phases.summary: Add focused resolver conflict and precedence tests.

jobs.name: p14-m1-e2-t002-conflict-tests
jobs.prompt: Complete claimed backlog task P14.M1.E2.T002. Follow AGENTS.md plus src/test CLAUDE.md where relevant and follow PIRFL: inspect existing resolver implementation/tests, plan narrowly, add tests first where feasible, implement only any tiny production fix needed to make intended behavior pass, review, then fix. Do not run bl commands. Acceptance: tests cover duplicate bundles, invalid profile/room refs, allow+deny for same tool, workspace-vs-room override, missing memory grants, and no inherited access weakening global security policy. Prefer adding focused tests to test/test_scope_resolver.ml and config-loader tests only if loader behavior is implicated. Preserve Clawq casing. Run at least make test-run ARGS="test scope_resolver" and make fmt-check; run make test-run ARGS="test config_loader" if config loader tests change. Commit the work on the branch with a concise message.
